import React from 'react'; import { FiBarChart2, FiCheckSquare, FiClipboard, FiMapPin, FiTool } from 'react-icons/fi'; const Experience = () => { const highlights = [ { icon: , title: 'Project Controls', text: 'Built weekly reporting packs, cost trackers, RFIs, submittal logs, and risk registers for active civil works.', }, { icon: , title: 'Site Coordination', text: 'Coordinated contractors, consultants, inspections, and field changes to keep work aligned with drawings and permits.', }, { icon: , title: 'Technical Delivery', text: 'Prepared design markups, quantity takeoffs, method statements, and constructability reviews for infrastructure scopes.', }, ]; return (
Featured Experience

Civil Works, Project Delivery, and Construction Coordination

A focused record of delivering technical work packages, coordinating field teams, and keeping infrastructure projects moving with disciplined controls.

{highlights.map((item) => (
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.text}

))}

Senior Civil / Project Engineer

ABC Engineering Firm

2020 - Present

Led civil infrastructure work packages from planning through construction, coordinating consultants, contractors, cost controls, schedule updates, and technical submissions.

  • Managed design clarifications, site instructions, and change documentation.
  • Prepared quantity reviews, tender comparisons, and progress claims support.
  • Improved reporting cadence for active scopes across field and office teams.

Civil Engineer

XYZ Infrastructure

2018 - 2020

Supported public works delivery through site inspections, engineering documentation, contractor coordination, and technical reviews for roads, drainage, and utility scopes.

  • Conducted QA/QC checks and recorded nonconformance closeout actions.
  • Produced field reports, drawing markups, and inspection summaries.
  • Coordinated permit requirements and stakeholder updates for site teams.
); }; export default Experience;
